iterations.theme: Ruth Rollings' Pro-Life Journey and CBR UK's Impact: Methods, Challenges, and Testimonies
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, as the conversation flows continuously through the guest's personal story, organizational work, and broader philosophical and practical aspects of the pro-life movement, making a single comprehensive block the most logical division.
